Video.summary: Make your own washi tape!
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape
The Crafty Chica: Washi Tape

Video.summary: While picking out the perfect gift for dad can be tempting, sometimes a gift card is an even better idea. As they say, it is the thought that counts! With this Toolbox Fathers Day Craft, you can learn how to make the perfect gift for dad. By creating a DIY craft to keep the gift card tucked into, you give your dad some handmade love and something useful at the same time. Plus, you could easily use this homemade box to wrap up some homemade candies, as well.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft
FaveCrafts: Toolbox Father's Day Craft

Video.summary: Make a handmade journal with The Crafty Chica
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: Handmade Journal

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: Handmade Journal
The Crafty Chica: Handmade Journal

Video.summary: In this video, Kathy demonstrates how you can seal your favorite paint-pen-designs on glass.
Video.title: The Crafty Chica: How to Use Paint Pens on Glass - And Seal Them

Image.alt: The Crafty Chica: How to Use Paint Pens on Glass - And Seal Them
The Crafty Chica: How to Use Paint Pens on Glass - And Seal Them

Video.summary: Learn Knotted/Garter stitch with Mary Beth!
Video.title: Arm Knitting: Knotted (Garter) Stitch

Image.alt: Arm Knitting: Knotted (Garter) Stitch
Arm Knitting: Knotted (Garter) Stitch

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Medallions.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 25 - Medallions

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 25 - Medallions
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 25 - Medallions

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show we are making first day of school memories.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: First Day of School Memories

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: First Day of School Memories
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: First Day of School Memories

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Inset.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 15 - Inset

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 15 - Inset
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 15 - Inset

Video.summary: Fall into a soothing trance with Linh My Truong as she does Suminagashi paint patterns.
Video.title: Suminagashi Dreams Episode 3

Image.alt: Suminagashi Dreams Episode 3
Suminagashi Dreams Episode 3

Video.summary: In this special, Marc interviews Steve Harris, the President of Fine Woodworkers Association in Arizona.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Off to the Woodworking Show Part 2

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Off to the Woodworking Show Part 2
The Wood Whisperer: Off to the Woodworking Show Part 2

Video.summary: Need help setting up your shop? Check out these six shop layout tips!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: 6 Tips for Better Shop Layout!

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: 6 Tips for Better Shop Layout!
The Wood Whisperer: 6 Tips for Better Shop Layout!

Video.summary: An important aspect of building furniture that many new woodworkers overlook is the importance of finishing before the project is completely glued together. That’s the primary focus of this part of the series.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Low Entertainment Center Part 4

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Low Entertainment Center Part 4
The Wood Whisperer: Low Entertainment Center Part 4

Video.summary: This Advent calendar is relatively basic in design, but has 25 little cubbies with enough room for a special treat or a secret message. In the first part of the two-part series, I start working on the grid structure and the hanging of the doors. The grid structure is creating using a shop-made jig that is very similar to a box-joint jig.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Advent Calendar Part 1

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Advent Calendar Part 1
The Wood Whisperer: Advent Calendar Part 1

Video.summary: Last summer, on our Gadget Station delivery trip, we decided to stop and visit the one and only David Marks. If you’re not familiar with David, he is an incredible woodworker/designer and used to host a show on HGTV and the DIY Network called Woodworks. His show was a huge influence on me personally and I know thousands of other woodworkers feel the same way.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Shop Tour

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Shop Tour
The Wood Whisperer: David Marks Shop Tour

Video.summary: A deep red mahogany finish doesn’t have to be the result of a complicated process. I’ll show you how I use a simple two-step method to revitalize my mother in law’s old beat up rocking char. First, a coat of General Finishes Merlot Water-Based Dye. Second, a coat of General Finishes Brown Mahogany Gel Stain. Its all finished off with a nice satin lacquer topcoat.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: A Deep Red Mahogany Finish

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: A Deep Red Mahogany Finish
The Wood Whisperer: A Deep Red Mahogany Finish

Video.summary: Marc teaches how to finish up your arts & crafts table so it will serve you for a long long time.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: How to Build an Arts & Crafts Table

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: How to Build an Arts & Crafts Table
The Wood Whisperer: How to Build an Arts & Crafts Table

Video.summary: This large assembly table is a great inexpensive alternative to the long and cumbersome process of building a torsion box.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: My New BIG Assembly Table

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: My New BIG Assembly Table
The Wood Whisperer: My New BIG Assembly Table

Video.summary: One of the greatest things about being a woodworker is the fact that you can build things that will make a difference in people's lives. Never has this "power" been so palpable as when I was asked recently to make a memorial box for my Uncle Tom. I'll admit that I found the task very difficult, not only for emotional reasons but because I had a time constraint of only two days.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Memorial Box

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Memorial Box
The Wood Whisperer: Memorial Box

Video.summary: The first time I saw a flexible sanding strip in action was while watching an episode of Woodworks going on almost 10 years ago. David Marks incorporates lots of curves in his work and the man knows a thing or two about making them. Since then, I have made numerous sanding strips in all shapes and sizes and my curves are about as perfect and smooth as they can be.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Flexible Sanding Strip

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Flexible Sanding Strip
The Wood Whisperer: Flexible Sanding Strip

Video.summary: Way back in 2006, I was commissioned to build a set of poker chip trays by a gentleman named Chris Hoomani. I haven't revisited this project since then and I thought it was time to bring this design to the Wood Whisperer audience. These trays are fun to make and you better make a bunch of them since poker fans really love these things!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Poker Chip Trays

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Poker Chip Trays
The Wood Whisperer: Poker Chip Trays

Video.summary: Krylon recently released a line of exterior wood stains in spray form. A very convenient way to transfer color to your outdoor projects! I sprayed 6 different test boards (maple and white oak) just to see how well the stain applies.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain
The Wood Whisperer: Krylon Spray Stain

Video.summary: The exciting conclusion to Rick’s adventure into the world of lutherie. Rick does an incredible job recovering from his previous, nearly disastrous mistake. He takes us through the final assembly as well as his finishing process, which involves a number of techniques including pore-filling, French polish, and wiping varnish. Congratulations to Rick and a huge thank you for letting me tear up your video footage. I know more than a few folks have been inspired to dive into the wonderful world of instrument-making.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 3

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 3
The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 3

Video.summary: In this episode, learn with Marc how to create a stable assembly table stand that will hold even the heaviest table.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Assembly Table Stand

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Assembly Table Stand
The Wood Whisperer: Assembly Table Stand

Video.summary: The bed comes to life with the completion of the hardware and the support system!
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - Hardware - Supports - Finish

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - Hardware - Supports - Finish
The Wood Whisperer: Platform Bed - Hardware - Supports - Finish

Video.summary: Looking for a new property with a shop in Missouri.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Property Search and a Bad Surprise

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Property Search and a Bad Surprise
The Wood Whisperer: Property Search and a Bad Surprise

Video.summary: Learn with Marc how to make your own veneer press.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cut Your Own Veneer aka Wish You Veneer

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Cut Your Own Veneer aka Wish You Veneer
The Wood Whisperer: Cut Your Own Veneer aka Wish You Veneer

Video.summary: Recently, my son has been obsessed with the Disney movie Moana. One of the primary characters is the demigod Maui who wields a magical hook. The hook has a very distinct look and is adorned with special carvings. Using a single 2×4, I made a kid-sized version of the hook.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Make a Kid Size Maui's Hook

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Make a Kid Size Maui's Hook
The Wood Whisperer: Make a Kid Size Maui's Hook

Video.summary: This is a simple method to get started sharpening without breaking the bank.
Video.title: The Wood Whisperer: Cheap Effective Chisel Sharpening

Image.alt: The Wood Whisperer: Cheap Effective Chisel Sharpening
The Wood Whisperer: Cheap Effective Chisel Sharpening

Video.summary: What's up guys! for this Frog food we are going to learn how to draw hands! Thats right, it's a tutorial! You asked for it, and I delivered. Well, to the best of my abilities. I am by no means an expert but I am happy to show you all how I learned.
Video.title: Digital Painting - Frog Food: How to Draw Hands Tutorial

Image.alt: Digital Painting - Frog Food: How to Draw Hands Tutorial
Digital Painting - Frog Food: How to Draw Hands Tutorial

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we celebrate Strawberry season with a healthy treat from healthy Chef and Partyologist Nancy Waldeck.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Favorite Things

Video.summary: Ready for an excuse to use up those scrap paper pieces that have been lying around? This Cute Scrap Paper Garland is the perfect craft that can clear up some of those extra paper pieces. Plus, you get a really cute DIY home decor garland that you can make and use for all different kinds of occasions. No matter where you hang this homemade garland, it is sure to get complimented. Plus, using die cuts make creating this DIY garland super quick and easy!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Cute Scrap Paper Garland

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Cute Scrap Paper Garland
FaveCrafts: Cute Scrap Paper Garland

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Triangle Double-Bar Wells.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 6 - Triangle Double-Bar Wells

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 6 - Triangle Double-Bar Wells
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 6 - Triangle Double-Bar Wells

Video.summary: Madonna teaches CT Linked Flowers.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 19 - CT Linked Flowers

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 19 - CT Linked Flowers
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 19 - CT Linked Flowers

Video.summary: Madonna teaches CT Stars Gapped.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 18 - CT Stars Gapped

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 18 - CT Stars Gapped
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Day 18 - CT Stars Gapped

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. In today's show, we share a clever way to lets your kids know they are going to Disney.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Spring Crafts and More

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Spring Crafts and More
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Spring Crafts and More

Video.summary: Decorate your walls with handmade butterfly decor!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Butterfly DIY Wall Decor

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Butterfly DIY Wall Decor
FaveCrafts: Butterfly DIY Wall Decor

Video.summary: Sometimes it can really be a challenge finding the exact style you want from a headband. This Fleece Flower DIY Headband shows you how you can make the perfect floral headband just the way you want. This DIY headband project is the perfect flirty and girly headband that makes a great DIY gift too. If you have a friend that loves flowers, or are even contemplating what to get your flower girl in your wedding make them this handmade headband and they will be in love!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband
FaveCrafts: Fleece Flower DIY Headband

Video.summary: Any mom or grandma likes presents that are made by hand. This box of cards is a perfect size to carry in your purse and bring out when someone asks to see the kids. The box also holds gift cards, business cards and small gifts- style it to fit any occasion! The Mothers Day Card Box is the perfect way to show mom you care all the while giving her something practical to use. Whether she uses this adorable box to hold keepsakes or important business card, it is sure to keep her smiling for days to come.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Mother's Day Card Box

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Mother's Day Card Box
FaveCrafts: Mother's Day Card Box

Video.summary: Madonna introduces Advent of Tess and what materials and skills are needed for the series.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Welcome

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Welcome
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: Welcome

Video.summary: Going on a trip? Need a gift tag? Looking for a cute purse accessory? This Personalized DIY Luggage Tag is the perfect craft that can serve a number of purposes. Not only is this the perfect die cut craft that you can completely personalize and make your own, but you can also complete this craft in less than an hour. If you really need a new luggage tag for a trip but don't want to run to the store and buy one, this craft video can show you how easy it is to make your own!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag
FaveCrafts: Personalized DIY Luggage Tag

Video.summary: Madonna teaches Firecracker.
Video.title: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 20 - Firecracker

Image.alt: Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 20 - Firecracker
Origami Tessellations - Advent of Tess: 2023 Day 20 - Firecracker
